catalog_content:
Item Name: Bob's Red Mill Unbleached All Purpose Flour, 5lb (Pack of 1) - Organic, Vegan, Kosher
Bullet Point 1: The 10-12% protein content of this all-purpose flour ensures good gluten development and a satisfying texture, so it’s better suited for yeast breads than cake flour or pastry flour
Bullet Point 2: Bromate can be added to flour to enhance the rise of the dough when baking, but Bob's Red Mill opts for adding malted barley, which has the same effect naturally
Bullet Point 3: Includes no-fail recipes for cookies, brownies and more on the package
Bullet Point 4: An excellent source of folate
Bullet Point 5: BOB'S RED MILL: Make folks a little happier: it’s the idea that keeps our stone mills grinding to fill every bag with wholesome goodness
Value: 80.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Mid-tier organic flour brand with natural and vegan claims, positioned as a premium alternative to conventional all-purpose flour. The 5lb size offers good value for home bakers, with added recipe guidance enhancing usability. Non-GMO certification and absence of artificial additives support a health-conscious price point.
